_meta.description: Venue house rules and policies for board game cafes

rules.title: Table Time
rules.description: Day pass ($10) gives unlimited play all day. No time limits on individual games.

rules.title: Game Care
rules.description: Please keep food and drinks away from game components. Use coasters on game tables.

rules.title: Missing Pieces
rules.description: If you notice a missing piece, let staff know right away. Don't try to fix it yourself.

rules.title: Learning Games
rules.description: Staff can teach you any game in the library. Just ask at the counter!

rules.title: Noise Level
rules.description: Have fun! Just be mindful of neighboring tables. Indoor voices, please.

rules.title: Children
rules.description: Kids under 12 must be accompanied by an adult. We have a great kids section!

rules.title: Reservations
rules.description: Walk-ins welcome. Large groups (6+) should reserve ahead via phone or website.

rules.title: Clean Up
rules.description: Please return games to the front counter when finished. Staff will re-shelve them.

rules.title: Day Pass
rules.description: Day pass is $10 per person for unlimited play. Monthly membership $25 — includes free drip coffee.

rules.title: Game Care
rules.description: Keep food and drinks at least 6 inches from game components. Coasters provided on every table.

rules.title: Game Guru
rules.description: Our Game Gurus can teach any of our 2,600+ games. Flag one down or use the QR code on your table.

rules.title: Missing Pieces
rules.description: Report missing pieces at the counter. We have replacement parts for most popular games.

rules.title: Table Limits
rules.description: No time limits Mon-Thu. Fri-Sat tables limited to 3 hours during peak (6-10pm).

rules.title: Groups
rules.description: Parties of 8+ should reserve at meepleville.com or call (702) 555-GAME.

rules.title: Kids Welcome
rules.description: Kids 10 and under play free with a paying adult. Family section available near the entrance.

rules.title: Clean Up
rules.description: Return games to the front counter. Our team will sort and re-shelve. Never re-box a game yourself — we have a system!

rules.title: Photos
rules.description: Photos welcome! Tag us @MeeplevilleLV. No flash photography during events.

rules.title: Events
rules.description: Tournament Tuesdays, Date Night Wednesdays, Family Fridays. Check the board for this week's schedule.

rules.title: Cover Charge
rules.description: $10 per person for all-day gaming. First drink included with entry.

rules.title: Game Handling
rules.description: Wash hands before playing. No greasy foods at game tables — snack bar available in the lounge area.

rules.title: Learn to Play
rules.description: Staff demos available on the hour. Check the chalkboard for scheduled teach sessions.

rules.title: Peak Hours
rules.description: Friday and Saturday 5-11pm: 2-hour table limit. Weekdays: unlimited.

rules.title: Groups & Events
rules.description: Private rooms available for groups of 10+. Book at knightanddaygames.com.

rules.title: Return Games
rules.description: Stack components neatly and bring games to the return shelf. Staff handles re-shelving.

rules.title: Volume
rules.description: This is a social space — enjoy yourselves! Just be mindful of tournament tables (marked with flags).

rules.title: WiFi
rules.description: Free WiFi: KnightDay_Guest. Password on your receipt.
